titleStmt.title: SII 28.10: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 10. (A.R. No. 10 of 1913.) PERAMBALŪR, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This records a settlement made jointly by Ayyaṅgāṟappar, the agent (kāriyattukku-kartar) of Śrīmatu Kṛishṇappa-nāyakkar and the nāṭṭār, of Veṇbāṟ-chirmai in respect of Nochiyam village which as per records (kalveṭṭivitta-paṭi) was sarvvamāṉyam (land freed from all taxes and encumberances) of Perumāḷ Gopāla-kūttar of Perumbalūr. In this village which was being managed (naḍatti-vanda) by Nochchiyam dhanma-puttirar, Chūrappa-Nāyakkar-ayyaṉ began to collect some amount of pōṉ as chōḍi. Now it was ordered that this chōḍi-poṉ need not be paid and the village would be fully sarvvamānya. The income from it must be utilised for the worship of the God and maintenance (of the temple structure) of Perumāḷ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
viyavaruṣam māci mātam 2 10 6 nāḷ śrīmatu kiṣṇappanāyakkar Ayyan kāriyattuku kaṟtarāṉa Ayyaṅkāṟapparum veṇ pāṟ cirmai nāṭṭārum perumpalūr perumā
ḷ kopāla kūttaṟku nocciyam kiṟāmam caṟuvamāṉiyamāka cetu kalveṭṭivitta[ paṭiWritten as ṭṭi] pūṟupamāka nocciyam taṉma puttirar viṭṭu naṭatti vanta kirāmattile cūrappa nāyak
kar Ayyan cila poṉ coṭiyāka paṟṟik koṇṭu varukaiyil Ippoḻutu Anta coṭi poṉ veṇ ṭāmeṉṟu niṟutti caṟuvamānyamāka perumāḷ
tiruvārātiṉai tiruppaṇikku cettom yinta taṉmam cantirātittavaraiyum naṭatti varakkaṭaipomākavum yinta tanmattai yirācakāmākutal nāṭṭār rākutal Akutam
paṇṇina perkaḷ taṅkaḷ mātāpitāvai konṟa tocattile poka kaṭaivarākavum keṅkai karaiyile kārāmpacuvai konṟa toṣattile poka kaṭa
varākavum .
Digital edition of SII 28.10 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
